summary: Verified the 'Grounded' accent word readability fix on hero slide 2 of Peninsula Agritrade homepage. Fix confirmed: the maroon accent span now carries a stronger dark drop-shadow ('0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.55), 0 2px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.75)') and the overlay gradient uses the deepened stops (0.6 -> 0.42 -> 0.55). All 3 hero slides render correctly (Connecting / Grounded / Partnerships) with maroon accent + white headline + italic subtitle readable. Stats row shows all 6 stats. No console errors.

slides_verified.slide_0_connecting: Connecting Qatar to the global agricultural value chain... - readable
slides_verified.slide_1_grounded: Grounded in discipline, integrity, and proven operational excellence across global markets. - accent word clearly readable against bright port background with dark halo shadow
slides_verified.slide_2_partnerships: Partnerships built on trust, long-term alignment, and Qatar's Food Security Vision 2030. - readable

context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero slide 2 'Grounded' readability fix verified. Accent span textShadow and overlay gradient stops match spec. All 3 slides + stats row + zero console errors. No further action required.
rca of the issue: Not applicable - fix verification only. The maroon accent word 'Grounded' now has a stronger dark drop shadow that visually separates it from the bright port photo, making it readable.
